description_long: This object consists of seven round, gold-colored coins arranged in a gentle arc. Each coin features intricate engravings, with some displaying what appears to be a human figure or face surrounded by ornate patterns and inscriptions. The coins have a slightly worn, antique finish, suggesting historical or collectible value. The edges of the coins are finely detailed, and the surfaces reflect light with a subtle metallic sheen. The reverse sides of the coins also show complex designs, possibly of symbolic or cultural significance. The overall appearance is that of a set of decorative medallions or commemorative coins, likely intended for display or as part of a jewelry ensemble.
description: A set of seven intricately engraved, gold-colored coins with ornate patterns and antique finish, arranged in an arc.
description_view_0: Seven gold coins are visible from above, showing detailed engravings and inscriptions on their faces.
description_view_1: The coins are seen edge-on, appearing as thin, straight lines with a metallic sheen and no visible engravings.
description_view_2: The reverse sides of the coins are visible, displaying different but equally intricate designs and patterns.
description_view_3: Another edge-on view of the coins, similar to view 1, emphasizing their thinness and uniformity.
